problem_text_cn:
## 七、(22分)
水平固定的矩形气缸，用一个质量可略的长方形绝热活塞板等分为左、右两半部分。左半部分的下方是水，上方是纯净的饱和水蒸气，压强为$ p_{0} $、温度为$ T_{0} $。右半部分内是摩尔数为$\nu$、摩尔定容热容为$ C_{V,m}=\frac{5}{2}R $的理想气体，压强为$ p_{i} $、温度为$ T_{i} $。气缸左侧为导热板，它与温度为$ T_{0} $的恒温大热源接触，气缸的其他面板都绝热。中间绝热活塞板与气缸上、下壁之间的摩擦系数同为常数$ \mu $，系统初始状态的几何参量已在图中示出。
(1)假设初始状态为平衡态，且设右侧气体压强$ p_{i} $若稍有增大，活塞板即会朝左移动，试求$ p_{i} $，$ T_{i} $。
(2)再设右侧气体被一电阻丝加热，活塞板因气体膨胀而左移，期间过程可处理成准静态过程，且活塞板摩擦生热生成的热量全部朝左传送，试求活塞板左移量为$ x(\frac{L}{2}>x>0) $时，右侧气体的压强$ p_{x} $和温度$ T_{x} $。
(3)若电阻丝单位时间供热量为$q$常量，将初始时刻记为$ t=0 $，试求活塞板左移为$ x(\frac{L}{2}>x>0) $的时刻$t$，并计算$ x\to L/2 $的时刻$ t_{e} $，再取$ \mu=3l/2H $，给出$ t_{e} $表达式。解题时可略去水蒸气液化成水的体积，将水的密度记为常量$ \rho $。
problem_text_en:
## Seven. (22 points)
A horizontally fixed rectangular cylinder is divided into two equal parts by a mass‑negligible, adiabatic rectangular piston plate. In the lower part of the left half there is water, and in the upper part pure saturated water vapor with pressure $p_{0}$ and temperature $T_{0}$. The right half contains an ideal gas with mole number $\nu$, molar heat capacity at constant volume $C_{V,m}=\frac{5}{2}R$, pressure $p_{i}$, and temperature $T_{i}$. The left side of the cylinder is a heat‑conducting plate in contact with a large thermostatic heat source at temperature $T_{0}$, and the other walls of the cylinder are adiabatic. The friction coefficient between the adiabatic piston plate and the upper/lower walls of the cylinder is a constant $\mu$, and the initial geometric parameters of the system are shown in the figure.
(1) Assuming the initial state is equilibrium, and that a slight increase of the right‑side gas pressure $p_{i}$ would cause the piston plate to move leftwards, find $p_{i}$ and $T_{i}$.
(2) Now suppose the gas on the right is heated by an electric resistance wire, causing the piston plate to move leftwards due to gas expansion. The process can be treated as quasi‑static, and the frictional heat generated by the piston plate is all transferred to the left. For a leftward displacement $x$ ($\frac{L}{2}>x>0$) of the piston plate, find the pressure $p_{x}$ and temperature $T_{x}$ of the gas on the right.
(3) If the heating wire supplies heat at a constant rate $q$ per unit time, taking the initial instant as $t=0$, find the time $t$ when the piston plate has moved leftwards by $x$ ($\frac{L}{2}>x>0$), and calculate the limiting time $t_{e}$ when $x\to L/2$. Then, taking $\mu=3l/2H$, give the expression for $t_{e}$. When solving, the volume change due to vapor condensation may be neglected, and the density of water is denoted by a constant $\rho$.
problem_solution_cn:
## 七、(22分)
全过程左侧温度$T_0$不变，饱和水蒸气压强$p_0$也不变。
(1)初态活塞板两侧压强如题解图1所示，活塞板受力如题解图2所示。因水的侧压强随$h$线性增大，故侧压力的大小可等效于$ h=H/2 $处的压强$ (p_{0}+\frac{1}{2}\rho gH) $作用于$S/2$面积压力的大小。由于左侧作用力不对称，使活塞板下端面左侧边与缸壁间有一对竖直方向作用力，活塞板上端面右侧边与缸壁间有一对竖直方向作用力，相应地产生两个水平摩擦力。竖直方向力平衡，要求法向作用力大小同为$N$，两个摩擦力大小便同为$ f=\mu N $。

相对活塞板中心点$C$，压强$ p_{0} $，$ p_{1} $提供的力矩均为零。左下侧水的重力压强提供的力矩大小为
$$ \int_{0}^{H}\rho gh\left(\frac{dh}{2H}S\right)h=\left.\frac{\rho gS}{2H}\cdot\frac{h^{3}}{3}\right|_{0} ^{H}=\frac{1}{6}\rho gSH^{2}, $$
或简单地表述为
$$ \left[\left(\rho g\frac{H}{2}\right)\cdot\frac{S}{2}\right]\frac{2}{3}H, $$
则重力压强平均值在$ \frac{S}{2} $面积上产生的压力作用于$ \frac{2}{3}H $处的力矩相对$C$力矩平衡，要求
$$ 2N\cdot\frac{l}{2}=\frac{1}{6}\rho gSH^{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad N=\rho gSH^{2}/6l, $$
得
$$ f=\mu N=\mu\rho gSH^{2}/6l. $$
水平方向力平衡，要求
$$ p_{i}S=p_{0}\cdot\frac{S}{2}+\left(p_{0}+\rho gH\frac{H}{2}\right)\cdot\frac{S}{2}+2f, $$
解得
$$ p_{i}=p_{0}+\frac{1}{4}\rho gH+\frac{1}{3l}\mu\rho gH^{2}.\qquad(7\text{分}) $$
由$ p_{i}LS=\nu RT_{i} $，得
$$ T_{i}=(p_{0}+\frac{1}{4}\rho gH+\frac{1}{3l}\mu\rho gH^{2})LS/\nu R.\qquad(2\text{分}) $$
(2)活塞板左移量为$ x(\frac{L}{2}>x>0) $的过程态，水面高度记为$y$，则有$ y(L-x)=H L $，$ \Rightarrow \quad y=H L/(L-x) $，受力情况如题解图3所示。

相对活塞板中心点$C$，压强$ p_{0} $，$ p_{z} $提供的力矩均为零。左侧水的重力压强提供的力矩大小为
$$ -\int_{0}^{y-H} \rho gh\left(\frac{dh}{2H} S\right)\left[(y-H)-h\right]+\int_{y-H}^{y} \rho gh\left(\frac{dh}{2H} S\right)\left[h-(y-H)\right]\\ =\frac{1}{2 H} \rho g S \int_{0}^{y} h\left[h-(y-H)\right] d h\\ =\frac{1}{4 H} \rho g S\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right) . $$
力矩平衡，要求
$$ 2 N \cdot \frac{l}{2}=\frac{1}{4 H} \rho g S\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right), $$
得
$$ N=\frac{1}{4 l H} \rho g S\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right),\quad f=\mu N=\frac{\mu}{4 l H} \rho g S\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right). $$
水平方向力平衡，要求
$$ p_{z} S=p_{0} S+\int_{0}^{y} \rho g h\left(\frac{d h}{2 H} S\right)+2 f=p_{0} S+\frac{1}{2 H} \rho g S \cdot \frac{y^{2}}{2}+\frac{\mu}{2 l H} \rho g S\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right), $$
得
$$ \left\{\begin{array}{l}p_{x}=p_{0}+\frac{1}{4 H} \rho g y^{2}+\frac{\mu}{2 l H} \rho g\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right)\\ y=H L /(L-x)\end{array}\right., \qquad(5\text{分}) $$
由$ p_{x}(L+x) S=\nu RT_{x} $，得
$$ \left\{\begin{array}{l}T_{x}=\left[p_{0}+\frac{1}{4 H} \rho g y^{2}+\frac{\mu}{2 l H} \rho g\left(H y^{2}-\frac{1}{3} y^{3}\right)\right](L+x) \frac{S}{\nu R}, \\ \end{array}\right. \qquad(2\text{分}) $$
(3)对右侧气体，由热力学第一定律得
$$ q t=\int_{0}^{x} p_{x} S d x+\nu C_{V, m}\left(T_{x}-T_{i}\right),\quad C_{V, m}=\frac{5}{2} R, $$
将
$$ \int_{0}^{x} p_{x} S d x=p_{0} S x+\frac{1}{4} \rho g S H L \frac{x}{L-x}+\frac{\mu}{2 l} \rho g S H^{2} L \frac{x}{L-x}-\frac{\mu}{12 l} \rho g S H^{2} L \frac{(2 L-x) x}{(L-x)^{2}}, $$
$$ \nu C_{V, m}\left(T_{x}-T_{i}\right)=\frac{5}{2}\left\{p_{0} S x+\frac{1}{4} \rho g S \frac{(3 L-x) x}{(L-x)^{2}} H L+\frac{\mu}{l} \rho g S\left[\frac{(2 L-3 x)(L+x) L}{6(L-x)^{3}}-\frac{1}{3}\right] H^{2} L\right\} $$
代入，得
$$ \begin{aligned} t&=\frac{S}{q}\left\{p_{0} x+\frac{1}{4} \rho g H L \frac{x}{L-x}+\frac{\mu}{2 l} \rho g H^{2} L \frac{x}{L-x}-\frac{\mu}{12 l} \rho g H^{2} L \frac{(2 L-x) x}{(L-x)^{2}}\right\} \\ &\quad +\frac{5 S}{2 q}\left\{p_{0} x+\frac{1}{4} \rho g H L \frac{(3 L-x) x}{(L-x)^{2}}+\frac{\mu}{l} \rho g H^{2} L\left[\frac{(2 L-3 x)(L+x) L}{6(L-x)^{3}}-\frac{1}{3}\right]\right\} . \qquad(4\text{分}) \end{aligned} $$
取$ x=\frac{L}{2} $时，有
$$ t_{e}=\frac{7}{4} \frac{p_{0} L}{q} S+\frac{27}{8} \frac{\rho g H L}{q} S+\frac{23}{12} \frac{\mu \rho g H^{2} L}{q l} S, \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
再设$ \mu=3 l / 2 H $，有
$$ t_{e}=\frac{L S}{4 q}\left(7 p_{0}+25 \rho g H\right) . \qquad(1\text{分}) $$
img_cn:
## 七、(22分)
水平固定的矩形气缸，用一个质量可略的长方形绝热活塞板等分为左、右两半部分.左半部分的下方是水，上方是纯净的饱和水蒸气，压强为$ p_{0} $、温度为$ T_{0} $.右半部分内是摩尔数为$ \nu $、摩尔定容热容为$ C_{V,m}=\frac{5}{2}R $的理想气体，压强为$ p_{i} $、温度为$ T_{i} $.气缸左侧为导热板，它与温度为$ T_{0} $的恒温大热源接触，气缸的其他面板都绝热.中间绝热活塞板与气缸上、下壁之间的摩擦系数同为常数$ \mu $，系统初始状态的几何参量已在图中示出.

(1)假设初始状态为平衡态，且设右侧气体压强$ p_{i} $若稍有增大，活塞板即会朝左移动，试求$ p_{i} $，$ T_{i} $.
(2)再设右侧气体被一电阻丝加热，活塞板因气体膨胀而左移，期间过程可处理成准静态过程，且活塞板摩擦生热生成的热量全部朝左传送，试求活塞板左移量为$ x(\frac{L}{2}>x>0) $时，右侧气体的压强$ p_{x} $和温度$ T_{x} $.
(3)若电阻丝单位时间供热量为q常量，将初始时刻记为$ t=0 $，试求活塞板左移为$ x(\frac{L}{2}>x>0) $的时刻t，并计算$ x\to L/2 $的时刻$ t_{e} $，再取$ \mu=3l/2H $，给出$ t_{e} $表达式.
解题时可略去水蒸气液化成水的体积，将水的密度记为常量$ \rho $.

题图中标注了几何参量，包括气缸长度L，高度H，活塞板长度l，横截面积S，以及初始水位H等。

这是一道物理题的解答图，主体为一道关于活塞板受力分析及压强计算的物理题。题目说明全过程左侧温度和饱和水蒸气压强不变，阐述了初态活塞板两侧压强及受力情况，提到水侧压力等效计算等内容。解题过程中有相关公式推导，如通过力矩平衡计算法向作用力和摩擦力，还涉及由压强计算温度的公式。图中有活塞装置示意图，标注了压强 \(p_0\)、\(p_1\)、高度 \(H\)、\(h\) 及面积 \(S\) 等物理量及受力方向。

这张图片展示的是一道物理或工程流体力学的计算题解答过程，纸张为白色，上面是黑色印刷字体。
主要内容围绕活塞板左移量为$x$时的相关计算，包括水面高度公式推导，通过对左侧水重力压强力矩计算，得出力矩平衡式求出作用力$N$；接着依据水平力平衡得出压力关系；最后对右侧气体利用热力学第一定律进行复杂推导计算。
还给出了一些取值计算示例，如$x = \frac{L}{2}$和$\mu = 3l/2H$时的结果。整体布局规整，公式排版清晰。
img_en:
## Seven. (22 points)
A horizontally fixed rectangular cylinder is divided into two equal parts by a mass‑negligible, adiabatic rectangular piston plate. In the lower part of the left half there is water, and in the upper part pure saturated water vapor with pressure $p_{0}$ and temperature $T_{0}$. The right half contains an ideal gas with mole number $\nu$, molar heat capacity at constant volume $C_{V,m}=\frac{5}{2}R$, pressure $p_{i}$, and temperature $T_{i}$. The left side of the cylinder is a heat‑conducting plate in contact with a large thermostatic heat source at temperature $T_{0}$, and the other walls of the cylinder are adiabatic. The friction coefficient between the adiabatic piston plate and the upper/lower walls of the cylinder is a constant $\mu$, and the initial geometric parameters of the system are shown in the figure.

(1) Assuming the initial state is equilibrium, and that a slight increase of the right‑side gas pressure $p_{i}$ would cause the piston plate to move leftwards, find $p_{i}$ and $T_{i}$.
(2) Now suppose the gas on the right is heated by an electric resistance wire, causing the piston plate to move leftwards due to gas expansion. The process can be treated as quasi‑static, and the frictional heat generated by the piston plate is all transferred to the left. For a leftward displacement $x$ ($\frac{L}{2}>x>0$) of the piston plate, find the pressure $p_{x}$ and temperature $T_{x}$ of the gas on the right.
(3) If the heating wire supplies heat at a constant rate $q$ per unit time, taking the initial instant as $t=0$, find the time $t$ when the piston plate has moved leftwards by $x$ ($\frac{L}{2}>x>0$), and calculate the limiting time $t_{e}$ when $x\to L/2$. Then, taking $\mu=3l/2H$, give the expression for $t_{e}$.
When solving, the volume change due to vapor condensation may be neglected, and the density of water is denoted by a constant $\rho$.

The diagram labels the geometric parameters, including cylinder length L, height H, piston length l, cross‑sectional area S, and initial water level H.

This is a solution diagram for a physics problem concerning force analysis and pressure calculation on a piston plate. The text states that the temperature on the left and the saturated vapor pressure remain constant. It explains the pressures on both sides of the piston in the initial state and the force situation, mentioning the equivalent calculation of the water's side pressure. The solution includes formula derivations, such as computing the normal force and friction via moment balance, and relating pressure to temperature. The diagram shows a schematic of the piston setup, labeling pressures $p_0$, $p_1$, heights $H$, $h$, area $S$, and force directions.

This picture displays the solution process of a physics or engineering fluid mechanics calculation problem, printed in black on white paper.
The main content revolves around the calculations for a piston displacement $x$, including derivation of the water‑height formula, moment calculation of the water's gravitational pressure on the left leading to a moment‑balance equation to find force $N$; then using horizontal force balance to obtain pressure relations; finally applying the first law of thermodynamics to the gas on the right for a complex derivation.
Some example calculations for specific values are also given, such as results for $x = \frac{L}{2}$ and $\mu = 3l/2H$. The layout is neat, with formulas clearly typeset.
problem_answer:
(1) $p_{i}=p_{0}+\dfrac{1}{4}\rho gH+\dfrac{1}{3l}\mu\rho gH^{2}$，$T_{i}=\left(p_{0}+\dfrac{1}{4}\rho gH+\dfrac{1}{3l}\mu\rho gH^{2}\right)\dfrac{L S}{\nu R}$。
(2) $p_{x}=p_{0}+\dfrac{1}{4H}\rho g y^{2}+\dfrac{\mu}{2lH}\rho g\left(H y^{2}-\dfrac{1}{3}y^{3}\right)$，其中$y=HL/(L-x)$；$T_{x}=\left[p_{0}+\dfrac{1}{4H}\rho g y^{2}+\dfrac{\mu}{2lH}\rho g\left(H y^{2}-\dfrac{1}{3}y^{3}\right)\right]\dfrac{(L+x)S}{\nu R}$。
(3) $t$表达式见解答；当$x\to L/2$时，$t_{e}=\dfrac{7}{4}\dfrac{p_{0}L}{q}S+\dfrac{27}{8}\dfrac{\rho gHL}{q}S+\dfrac{23}{12}\dfrac{\mu\rho gH^{2}L}{q l}S$；若取$\mu=3l/2H$，则$t_{e}=\dfrac{L S}{4 q}\left(7 p_{0}+25 \rho g H\right)$。
